description: Create a comprehensive GitHub Actions workflow for R package testing and checking. The workflow, named rcc, should trigger on push to main, master, release, and cran-* branches, on pull requests to main and master, on workflow dispatch with a ref input, on merge group checks requested, and on a scheduled cron job. The workflow should run multiple jobs: a smoke test job on ubuntu-latest, a check matrix job that depends on the smoke test job, and two more jobs that depend on the smoke test job and run on different matrices of R versions and operating systems.
